name: The Last Supper
oracleText:
I — Create a Food token.
II — Scry 2, then draw a card.
III — Creatures you control gain lifelink until end of turn. If you control a legendary creature, draw a card.
flavorText: "This is my body which is given for you: this do in remembrance of me." — Luke 22:19
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Colijn de Coter's "The Last Supper" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a CC0 faithful reproduction of the public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Colijn de Coter, The Last Supper
classics.sourceNotes: A strong panel-format Last Supper gives the saga a clean classics treatment.
